description_long: This house is a large, detached residential building set within a fenced yard, featuring a combination of single- and two-story sections. The main structure has a gable roof with dark shingles, while an adjacent section has a flat roof, and another has a low-pitched roof, creating a varied roofline. The property includes a spacious green lawn, a paved driveway leading to a three-car garage, and a backyard area with trees, shrubs, and outdoor seating. The front entryway is marked by a small porch with steps, flanked by tall, narrow shrubs and a pathway leading to the main door. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of small and medium sizes, and the exterior walls are finished in a light beige or tan material. The overall design is practical and suburban, with clear zones for recreation, parking, and entry.
description: A large suburban house with a mix of gable and flat roofs, beige exterior walls, a three-car garage, and a fenced yard with landscaped greenery and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, landscaped front yard, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard, additional greenery, and the rear facade of the house with more windows and a secondary entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three-car garage, flat-roofed section, and the expansive fenced lawn behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional landscaping, and the varied rooflines of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, flanking tall shrubs, and a simple single door
